programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 1
programme.desc: How can we reconcile the development needed to sustain the lives of nearly seven billion people with the protection of the Earth's natural resources? Yann Arthus-Bertrand and his team have chosen Gabon to continue their survey of the planet. We'll be discovering the Kongou Falls, the Langoué clearing with their elephant in Gabon. Then in Colombia, we will go on the island of Malpelo with their shark. Back to Gabon we will discover the Minkébé National Park and the bats in Franceville. We will also go to India in Hyderabad, which has convinced farmers to use no pesticides and no GMOs in their cultivation.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook - Season 4 - Citrus flavors
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrénées Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte d'Azur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While we're all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Topanga Canyon, AMBA Yoga
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Topanga Canyon, AMBA Yoga
programme.desc: Val goes to the heart of Topanga Canyon, California, a favorite spot for yoga addicts and nature lovers. Here she will experience AMBA Yoga, a kind of hollistic yoga for women. We will also attend a Sound Bowl session, a Tibetan practice considered the ultimate in meditation. In the heart of Venice Beach, we will discover the "Plant Lab", a new high-tech application that records the vibrations of plants to create music. Finally, Val will present us the largest concept store of rare crystals in South America.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Hot Springs
programme.desc: Still in Palm Springs, we will discover the Parker Hotel, the most trendy and design hotel in town. A French chef will take us to cook in the middle of nature. Then, Val will go to Desert Springs, a town known for its natural hot springs. At one of the many spas in town, Val will test one of the springs and even attend a Sound Bowl session.

programme.title: My First Garden - Season 1 - Growing mushrooms at home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Growing mushrooms at home
programme.desc: We meet at the Romainville market garden centre to learn how to grow mushrooms at home. Some varieties, such as button mushrooms, oyster mushrooms or shiitake mushrooms, grow quite easily in mushroom houses. But you too can do it. And today we will show you how to make a miniature version of this kit to grow oyster mushrooms at home.

programme.title: Vegetarian Delights - Season 1 - Mashed potatoes with vegetable gravy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Mashed potatoes with vegetable gravy
programme.desc: In this recipe, we prepare mashed potatoes in vegetable stock. The mashed potatoes are soft and melt-in-the-mouth, while the richly flavored broth of bell bell pepper, carrot, zucchini, celeriac and tomato enhances the whole.

programme.title: Vegetarian Delights - Season 1 - Sweet potato bruschetta
programme.desc: In this recipe, we reinvent the classic bruschetta by replacing the bread with a roasted sweet potato base. Garnished with tomatoes, guacamole, chilli pepper and a drizzle of olive oil, this healthy and tasty bruschetta is perfect for an aperitif or a light starter.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Carine (Nice)
programme.desc: After twenty years as a lawyer, Carine decided to give in to her desire to help others heal. Her inner journey led her to discover a passion for naturopathy as she rediscovered her love for nature and learned the healing qualities of the plants around her. Combined with a deep understanding of astrology and nutrition, she is now able to help others live better and find their own path.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Virginie (Lyon)
programme.desc: Virginie’s beautiful handwritten lettering decorates the walls and windows of many shops in and around Lyon, France, as she lives out her passion of finding beauty in every stroke. A former waitress, Virginie was struggling to find her calling when she suffered a life-altering horse accident that almost left her handicapped. At only 30, she was forced to put her whole life into perspective. She finally found herself through a love for graphic design and lettering, combined with a desire for freedom that came with working independently. To motivate other women, she has also launched “Ladyboss”, a network of inspiring women entrepreneurs.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Laetitia (French Alps)
programme.desc: While pregnant with her daughter, Laetitia, a former journalist, experienced a strong desire to change lifestyles and move to the countryside. Remembering the teachings of her grandmother, she began to venture outdoors into the surrounding Alps and study the different plants at her fingertips. Today she holds a wealth of knowledge about the medicinal and aromatherapeutic value of plants that she applies to making natural products. With utmost respect for the environment, Laetitia gathers only what she needs in order to make herbal infusions.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Louise (Oleron Island)
programme.desc: At only 20 years old, Louise is full of confidence and already achieved a personal dream of hers to share her passion for nutritious and locally-sourced ingredients on the island of Oleron, France. Repurposing a camping car, she set up a brunch and tea-time spot where the guests can hand-pick their ingredients in the adjacent organic fields. Louise transforms the ingredients into favourite creations of hers and even joins her father for boat trips when she needs to stock up on fresh fish for the menu!

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - Japan: Mass consumption - What the labels forget to mention - Part 1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Japan: Mass consumption - What the labels forget to mention - Part 1
programme.desc: In this instalment, Yann Arthus-Bertrand lifts the veil on the products people buy. Almost everything we buy has a direct impact on our environment. We head to Japan to talk about the impact of new technologies, then to the Republic of Congo in Bukavu for the coltan harvest. How does our total consumption affect the environment? What permanent brands are we imposing on our planet? How can we differentiate between useful and useless purchases?

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - Japan: Mass consumption - What the labels forget to mention - Part 2
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Japan: Mass consumption - What the labels forget to mention - Part 2
programme.desc: Above all, these reports are an opportunity for Yann Arthus-Bertrand to take stock of the planet and denounce certain human behaviors that are at the root of dramatic, even irreversible, environmental and climatic degradation. Off to Tokyo, then Kenya, to an animal sanctuary. Then on to Mount Fuji to learn how to live there, and all the plastic that clogs up the seas. Reports will focus on everyday products, chosen for their destructive production practices for both people and the environment.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook - Season 4 - The taste of bread
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The taste of bread
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 1 - Ojai Valley Lavender Festival
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ojai Valley Lavender Festival
programme.desc: Val Kahl is in the heart of Ojai, the lavender town, where she takes a tour in Ojai Valley Lavender Festival and tastes drink, gluten-free cookies and organic cooking products made of lavender. She later found herself in the middle of lavender field while stopping by the Frog Creek Farm. After working out on the hot power yoga around palm trees in Caravan Outpost, she heads out to Gratitude Rock for an organic fresh juice tasting with an avocado ranch view.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Japanese pagodas and Coconut Massage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Japanese pagodas and Coconut Massage
programme.desc: Val goes to Nicholas, a master of enlightenment, at his wellness ranch. Here, Val will try out some new high-tech relaxation sessions. She will then go to one of the zenest hotels in California, where she will participate in a yoga session in a Japanese pagoda, followed by a coconut massage. She will test a Cryo-Café, a new concept store that mixes coffee break and cryotherapy session. Finally, she will attend a Theremin session, a very special relaxation ceremony.

programme.title: My First Garden - Season 1 - Thinning seedlings
programme.desc: We meet in the market garden of Romainville to continue gardening together. In our previous episodes, we sowed chives and radishes. Today, we're going to learn how to take good care of them. And as a bonus, we'll show you a great technique to easily get even more plants in your garden. Let's get started!

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Vegetarian Delights - Season 1 - Risotto with asparagus
programme.desc: In this recipe, we prepare a creamy asparagus risotto, a delicate and refined dish. Arborio rice is slowly simmered in a flavorful broth, then combined with crisp asparagus and melted Parmesan. A hint of lemon and fresh herbs enhances this delicious and comforting meal.

programme.title: Vegetarian Delights - Season 1 - Potato cutlets with vegetable purée
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Potato cutlets with vegetable purée
programme.desc: In this recipe, we'll prepare delicious potato cutlets accompanied by a creamy vegetable purée. The cutlets are crispy on the outside with Japanese breadcrumbs and tender on the inside, while the celeriac puree adds a touch of sweetness and lightness. This dish is perfect for a comforting and tasty vegetarian meal.

programme.title: Earth in Sports - Season 5 - Episode 15
programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.title: Earth in Sports - Season 6 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Juliette (Morbihan)
programme.desc: Juliette has long been aware of the delicate beauty of nature. For years she spent her life on the sea, organising regattas for the traditional sailboats that are famous in the French region of Morbihan. Her appreciation for the elements made for a smooth transition as she decided to leave the water behind and return to the earth. Learning to shape a ball of clay into a graceful and elegant object, she discovered a passion for ceramics. Today, she lives from her creations and makes pieces that reflect their surroundings, the stunning Gulf of Morbihan.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Anna (Brittany)
programme.desc: Anna’s unusual background provided inspiration for her life change. Her career began as a wolf trainer for cinema and it was during these years that she developed her deep love for animals. After being tired of seeing them used as props and constantly in cages, she decided to leave the world of show business behind and start an eco-friendly sheep and goat pasture. To further share her passion for these gentle animals, Anna has opened a conservatory farm where visitors can experience first-hand the joys of being close to nature. She also makes amazing goat cheese!

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Cristina (Spain)
programme.desc: At 31 years old, the last thing Cristina expected when she went to see the doctor about a blocked ear was to leave the consultation with a diagnosis for Breast Cancer. This young and passionate sociologist decided to apply the same philosophy to her treatment as she did when surfing: when a wave crashes down on you, get up and try again. Through her healing journey she deepened her love for the ocean and also discovered the therapeutic capabilities of yoga for cancer patients. Today she shares her practice through surf and yoga retreats and is specialised in oncological yoga, helping others heal.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Idoia (Spain)
programme.desc: Idoia thrives on weaving together the sources of inspiration that surround her. Heavily influenced by the natural beauty of her home region of Galicia, Spain, she creates unique woven pieces from diverse and beautiful materials. Idoia’s pieces represent her vision of a modern woman, drawing from the traditions and experiences of those who perfected the craft before her and also pushing to innovate and adapt her creations for the modern world. Her recent collaboration with luxury fashion house Loewe is a dream come true for this modern artisan.

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 4 - Nature’s Heroes: Bangladesh - Part 1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nature’s Heroes: Bangladesh - Part 1
programme.desc: With Bangladesh as a running thread, Yann Arthus-Bertrand meets several people who have changed their lives to dedicate themselves to a major project. In Bangladesh, Yves and Runa Marre have created the Friendship Foundation. Among other things, they’ve created a floating hospital installed on an old barge bought in France. Julie Andersen, an ex-advertising executive from New York has come to South Africa to defend sharks with her Shark Angels Foundation. In North India, Kartik Satyanarayan is helping to stop the dreadful exploitation of the lippus bears (dancing bears). He’s created Wildlife SOS, a preserve to rehabilitate the bears that have been rescued and to give work to the men of...

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Full of hearty, traditional flavors, this dish features barley bread, a rustic and wholesome staple, paired with black-eyed beans cooked to perfection for a satisfying and nutritious meal. An episode celebrating the simplicity and richness of timeless Mediterranean recipes.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.sub-title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.desc: Malta’s event calendar blends food, music, innovation, and heritage, from the flavours of the Malta International Food Festival to the electronic energy of Glitch Festival. Spectacle takes to the skies at the Malta Air Show, creativity and gaming converge at PlayCon Malta, and history comes alive at Birgu by Candlelight, where the city’s streets are illuminated by tradition and atmosphere.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.sub-title: S06:E05 Granada Cordoba and Spains Costa del Sol
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: Il Provinciale
programme.sub-title: S01:E03 San Vito Lo Capo La Penisola del Tesoro
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta travels to San Vito Lo Capo in Sicily, retracing the footsteps of Saracen pirates who once haunted the Mediterranean. Amid coastal landscapes and historical echoes, the journey explores local traditions shaped by centuries of cultural exchange. Couscous, legends, and sea stories bring the spirit of Sicily’s past vividly to life.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Just south of Naples, we'll experience the breathtaking Amalfi Coast, including trendy Positano, the limoncello charms of Sorrento, the ancient Greek temples at Paestum, and the Blue Grotto hidden beneath the enchanting Isle of Capri.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.desc: Join Rick as we explore Andalucía - prancing horses, whitewashed hilltowns, kite surfing on sunny beaches. Then we'll summit the Rock of Gibraltar and sample Morocco, from tribal musicians and busy artisans to the magic of its markets

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The flavors of land and sea are brought together in the kitchen, with prawn linguine, a light and savory pasta dish brimming with fresh Mediterranean seafood. For dessert, galaktompoureko, a traditional Greek custard-filled pastry with golden, crispy layers, provides a sweet and indulgent finale. An episode celebrating the best of classic Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Property Transfer: Protection vs Efficiency
programme.desc: As property markets evolve, the laws governing ownership and transfer must evolve with them. This panel investigates how legal structures can protect buyers and investors without slowing progress, and what reforms are needed to ensure efficient, transparent, and future-ready property transfer across the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Origini
programme.sub-title: S01:E02 Tra Reggio e Messina lo Stretto necessario
programme.desc: Valentina Caruso and Francesco Gasparri explore the Strait of Messina, where unique underwater currents create an oceanic ecosystem within the Mediterranean. Diver Domenico Majolino and marine biologist Simona Ratti explain its natural wonders, while Vincenzo Annuario tells the story of the Cariddi ferry, reborn after serving in the navy. At the National Archaeological Museum of Reggio Calabria, we discover the legacy of Magna Grecia and the famous Riace Bronzes. The 1908 earthquake that devastated Messina and Reggio Calabria is commemorated at the Regional Museum of Messina with the exhibition "1908 City Museum".

Feel the pulse that moves the region.

programme.title: Il Provinciale
programme.sub-title: S01:E04 Sardegna alle Origini della Civilta
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta explores Sardinia’s ancient soul, from the Nuragic site of Su Nuraxi to the mystical Domus de Janas and the ruins of Tharros. The journey weaves through history, legend, and nature — from wild horses on the Giara di Gesturi to the mining village of Montevecchio. With local voices and musicians, the episode captures Sardinia’s deep identity and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Tuscanys Dolce Vita
programme.desc: We enjoy the charms of rural Tuscany's "sweet life" as we hunt for truffles in an oak forest, nibble on artichokes, and cruise through cypress groves in a classic convertible.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.sub-title: S01:E20 Greek Myths: Tartarus - The Damned of the Earth
programme.desc: The tale of Tartarus: The Damned of the Earth descends into the deepest abyss of the Greek underworld, where the most cursed souls are imprisoned. Here dwell legendary figures punished for defying the gods, bound by eternal torment. This dark realm serves as a chilling reminder of divine justice and the price of hubris. A myth that explores punishment, morality, and the shadow side of eternity.

programme.title: Concerto per Milano 2022
programme.desc: The Filarmonica della Scala and principal conductor Riccardo Chailly return to Piazza Duomo for the evocative Concerto per Milano. A landmark cultural event, this open-air performance brings world-class music to the heart of the city. Television direction by Stefania Grimaldi captures the grandeur and emotion of the evening.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The beats of the Mediterranean tell a story of culture, energy, and innovation. Malta’s Mużika Mużika celebrates local talent, Italy’s Nameless Festival electrifies the coast with indie and electronic sounds, Spain rocks out at Azkena Rock Festival, and Turkey swings with jazz at the Istanbul Caz Festival. Feel the pulse that moves the region.

programme.title: Med Minds 01 Caravaggio
programme.desc: Caravaggio, the rebellious Mediterranean painter, lived fiercely and left a legacy as bold as his character.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slowing down to savor Burgundy's historic, scenic, and edible delights, we revel in the rich traditions of this serene region, where nature is as sophisticated as the people.

programme.sub-title: Music Festivals All Over the Med
programme.desc: The Mediterranean comes alive to the sound of music! From Malta’s high-energy Rock the South and sophisticated Malta Jazz Festival, to Italy’s cutting-edge Limbo Festival, Spain’s forward-thinking Sonar Festival, and Turkey’s classical and contemporary Istanbul Music Festival, every corner of the region vibrates with rhythm, passion, and creativity.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Traditional and modern flavors combined with sheftalia, the classic Cypriot sausage made with chicken mince, paired with a refreshing lemon cheesecake mousse for dessert. A delicious blend of savory heritage and sweet indulgence that celebrates Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Nations 05 Morocco
programme.desc: Morocco! The bridge between Africa and the Mediterranean. Morocco's lively markets, delicious foods, and long-standing traditions show how trade, travellers, and different cultures have shaped the country over the years.

programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Building for Centuries Panel
programme.desc: What does it take to build something that lasts centuries? This panel examines how sustainability, environmental awareness, and long-term thinking are reshaping architecture and development, moving beyond short-term solutions toward a legacy of resilient, future-proof spaces.

programme.title: Med Minds 09 Hypatia
programme.desc: Hypatia, the brilliant philosopher of the Mediterranean, became a timeless symbol of knowledge, reason, and courage.

programme.title: Med Nations 05 Morocco
programme.desc: Morocco! The bridge between Africa and the Mediterranean. Morocco's lively markets, delicious foods, and long-standing traditions show how trade, travellers, and different cultures have shaped the country over the years.

programme.title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.sub-title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.desc: Accompany, contain, support: three key concepts defining Italy's iconic culinary creations—bread, cakes, and pizza. Bread, a fundamental staple, complements dishes while holding symbolic meaning. Savory pies, rooted in medieval tradition, have remained unchanged through centuries. Lastly, pizza, an ancient grain-based dish, achieved global fame after merging with tomatoes in Naples. Massimo Montanari leads us through this rich and flavorful journey.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: Whats On Bridges of Art and Cinema Turkey
programme.sub-title: Whats On Bridges of Art and Cinema Turkey
programme.desc: Turkey’s cultural landscape is shaped by cinema, contemporary art, and live performance, from the Adana Golden Boll Film Festival, celebrating national and regional filmmaking, to the Istanbul Biennial, a major platform for international contemporary art. Music and the performing arts take centre stage through the Istanbul Music Festival, Istanbul Theatre Festival, and Istanbul Jazz Festival, reflecting the country’s role as a crossroads of Mediterranean and global culture.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Granada
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Granada, in Spain’s Andalucía region, discovering its rich history, vibrant culture, and world-famous charm. She visits the stunning Alhambra, enjoys a delicious tapas tour, and experiences the passion of flamenco. Granada’s blend of Moorish heritage and modern energy makes it one of Spain’s most captivating cities. Special thanks to Gayle for an incredible tapas tour!

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS

programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: A sweet and comforting duo with skillet apple pie, warm and fragrant with tender apples and buttery crust, paired with soft, chocolatey crinkle cookies. An episode celebrating indulgent desserts and the cozy flavors of home baking.

programme.title: OSN Kubrick - Musica e cinema d'autore
programme.sub-title: OSN Kubrick - Musica e cinema d'autore
programme.desc: From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Min Chung, presents a symphonic concert dedicated to the iconic soundtracks from Stanley Kubrick's films. The programme features orchestral interpretations of memorable scores that have shaped Kubrick's cinematic legacy, blending classical masterpieces with evocative film music for a powerful and immersive experience.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Io Ti Cerchero
programme.desc: Valerio Fredianis investigation into his son Ettores death deepens as a shoe found near the Tiber River prompts forensic analysis leading him to a new location that may hold crucial evidence and compelling the police to reopen the case intensifying the search for the truth behind Ettores demise

programme.title: Cose da fare prima dei 30
programme.desc: Olivia, determined more than ever to follow her dream, is ready to do anything to record her album. Francesco, who invested all his savings in the supermarket, receives a bad surprise. Eros tries to ingratiate himself with Martina, the nerd of the class, to raise the average of his grades.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.sub-title: S01:E17 Greek Myths: Theseus - The Ravages of Oversight
programme.desc: The story of Theseus: The Ravages of Oversight follows the heroic journey of the Athenian prince as he faces a deadly challenge in the Labyrinth of Crete. With courage and cunning, he confronts a fearsome threat at the heart of the maze. But even heroes are not immune to the consequences of a single forgotten detail. A tale of bravery, fate, and the unseen weight of human error.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 With Love From Mauritius Ep 2
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Food Fact Fun Utrecht, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Boarding Pass Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 World Heritage Ancient Temples of Egypt, Egypt (ENG)
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Food Fact Fun Gouda, Netherlands
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 10 Days Scotland Isle Of Skye (ENG)
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Backpack Resavsk Pecina, Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 With Love From Mauritius Ep 1
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 World Spas Kempenki, Jordan (ENG)
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Food Fact Fun Utrecht, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Boarding Pass Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 World Heritage Ancient Temples of Egypt, Egypt (ENG)
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Food Fact Fun Gouda, Netherlands
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 10 Days Scotland Isle Of Skye (ENG)
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Backpack Resavsk Pecina, Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 With Love From Mauritius Ep 1
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 World Spas Kempenki, Jordan (ENG)
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Food Fact Fun Dubai 1
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 City Breaks Innsbruck, Austria
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 With Love From Mauritius Ep 2
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 XP Guide Copenhagen, Denmark
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Unwind Hotel Oriole, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Food Fact Fun Dubai 2
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E60 The Barrel - Part II
programme.desc: The Barrel is a cinematic tribute to those big-wave moments. This program takes a journey to some legendary barrel destinations - Hawaii's Pipeline, Indonesia and Kirra on Australia's Gold Coast.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 5, Serbia Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 6, Joensuu Part 1
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 7, Joensuu Part 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 8, Esposende
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E09 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 9, Great Britain
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E10 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 10, Poland Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E11 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 11, Poland Part 2
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E12 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 12, Bosnia
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E13 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 13, Romania
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E14 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 14, Gibraltar
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E15 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 15, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E16 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1 - Finland
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year’s event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2 - Serbia
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader’s position for the season. Don’t miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E06 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E07 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E08 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E09 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E10 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E14 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E15 Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E16 Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 2, Germany

Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland
programme.desc: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 12, Lithuania
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 13, Portugal
programme.desc: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.

programme.title: Stronger Than You Think
programme.desc: The brand new podcast Stronger Than You Think celebrating people who have faced adversity and challenges on the road to a very successful sporting career! This episode sees Ashleigh Wilmot sit down and chat to her co-host, Jodie Ounsley. The Exeter Chiefs star talks about being born profoundly deaf, overcoming hurdles and becoming a gladiator!

programme.title: Stronger Than You Think
programme.desc: A special episode of the brand new podcast Stronger Than You Think celebrating people who have faced adversity and challenges on the road to a very successful sporting career. The series is brought to you by Ashleigh Wilmot and Exeter Chiefs star Jodie Ounsley. The first episode sees Ashleigh sit down with Red Roses star Rosie Galligan.

programme.title: Stronger Than You Think
programme.desc: A brand new episode of Stronger Than You Think with another inspirational guest. Ashleigh Wilmot and Jodie Ounsley sit down with Arsenal and Scotland footballer Jen Beattie. Prepare for an emotional and uplifting discussion about Jen's journey with breast cancer.

programme.title: Stronger Than You Think
programme.desc: A brand new episode of Stronger Than You Think with another inspirational guest. Ashleigh Wilmot and Jodie Ounsley sit down with Milly Pickles - Social Media Content Creator, Motivational Speaker and Fitness and Disability advocate.

programme.title: Stronger Than You Think
programme.desc: A brand new episode of Stronger Than You Think with another inspirational guest. Ashleigh Wilmot and Jodie Ounsley sit down with referee, Hollie Davidson. Hollie refereed both the finals of Rugby World Cup 7s and Rugby World Cup 2021, within mere weeks of each other. With a CV including many ‘firsts’, Hollie has not only reached the top of the women’s game, but is also a trailblazer in the men’s game.

programme.title: Stronger Than You Think

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The 'King of Kickboxing' Rico Verhoeven puts his heavyweight belt on the line as he faces off against Brazilian Anderson Silva. Also, a one night, four-man featherweight tournament featuring former champion Serhii Adamchuk.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 36 SuperFight Series is headlined by Congolese-German light heavyweight Danyo Ilunga throwing down with the Netherlands' Michael Duut. Armenian-Belgian power puncher Harut Grigorian battles 23-year-old German prospect Danijel Solaja at welterweight in the can't miss co-headline bout. Plus two Super Bantamweight Grand Prix bouts. Muay Thai champion and MMA star Tiffany van Soest meets Canadian challenger Jessica Gladstone in one semifinal match-up, while 21-year-old Dutch prospect Isis Verbeek takes on undefeated Amel Dehby of France. The winners of each semifinal match-up will advance to the Grand Prix tournament final – the opening bout of GLORY: COLLISION.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The Lightweight title is on the line as Sittichai looks to defend his title against #1 challenger Marat Grigorian. There is also a four-man lightweight tournament on the card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: It's the fight everyone wants to see as GLORY Heavyweight champion, Rico Verhoeven takes on Badr Hari. Plus, the Welterweight title is on the line as Nieky Holzken meets Cedric Doumbé.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY is bringing out the heavy hitters for their final show of 2018, as an eight-man heavyweight tournament has been set for Rotterdam. Headlined by former heavyweight contender tournament winner Benjamin Adegbuyi and Jamal Ben Saddik as the top two seed, the winner will go on to win $100,000 for making it through the eight-man, three-round affair.

programme.title: Cesar 911
