programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: The Thompson pack is recovering from past trauma at the hands of an abusive ex-husband. Now, the women have suffered another tragedy: coonhound Nyla has become explosively aggressive, accidentally killing one family dog and viciously attacking another.

programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar sets out to help a young couple's cantankerous Chihuahua, whose recent blindness makes him increasingly hostile to be around. programme.title: Better Human Better Dog
programme.desc: Cesar works with a Mexican breed close to his heart when he rehabilitates twin dogs whose over-excited behavior has put their owner at risk of eviction from her apartment building. Later, an actress turns to Cesar for help with an overprotective pint-sized pooch.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.sub-title: S01 : E397 King of Hearts S1 E397
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.sub-title: S01 : E397 Second Chances S1 E397
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.sub-title: S04 : E89 Jodha Akbar S4 E89
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 This is Fate S2 E49
programme.desc: The story revolves around the two sisters of Pragya, from Kumkum Bhagya. Her sisters are Preeta and Shristhi who discover the existence of their mother Sarla and sister Pragya, after their father’s death. The sisters try to unite with their mother and sister.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: Guddan
programme.desc: Guddan, a cheerful yet clumsy young woman, ends up marrying Akshat Jindal aka AJ, a rich businessman with three sons and daughters-in-law. How will Guddan face the challenges that await her?

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.sub-title: S01 : E396 Undercover Love S1 E396
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Gangaaa
programme.desc: Gangaa, a child widow, faces numerous hardships while living in a community of ultra-conservative people. However, with a blend of charm and bravery, she challenges outdated traditions.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Maitree
programme.sub-title: S01 : E151 Maitree: The Rules of Love S1 E151
programme.desc: The lives of three friends, Nandini, Maitree and Ashish get inexplicably intertwined when an accident brings unexpected changes in their lives.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.desc: Guddan, a cheerful yet clumsy young woman, ends up marrying Akshat Jindal aka AJ, a rich businessman with three sons and daughters-in-law. How will Guddan face the challenges that await her?

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.sub-title: S01 : E397 Undercover Love S1 E397
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Gangaaa
programme.desc: Gangaa, a child widow, faces numerous hardships while living in a community of ultra-conservative people. However, with a blend of charm and bravery, she challenges outdated traditions.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.sub-title: S04 : E90 Jodha Akbar S4 E90
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.desc: The story revolves around the two sisters of Pragya, from Kumkum Bhagya. Her sisters are Preeta and Shristhi who discover the existence of their mother Sarla and sister Pragya, after their father’s death. The sisters try to unite with their mother and sister.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: Guddan
programme.desc: Guddan, a cheerful yet clumsy young woman, ends up marrying Akshat Jindal aka AJ, a rich businessman with three sons and daughters-in-law. How will Guddan face the challenges that await her?

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.sub-title: S01 : E398 Undercover Love S1 E398
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Gangaaa
programme.desc: Gangaa, a child widow, faces numerous hardships while living in a community of ultra-conservative people. However, with a blend of charm and bravery, she challenges outdated traditions.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Maitree
programme.sub-title: S01 : E153 Maitree: The Rules of Love S1 E153
programme.desc: The lives of three friends, Nandini, Maitree and Ashish get inexplicably intertwined when an accident brings unexpected changes in their lives.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.sub-title: S01 : E399 King of Hearts S1 E399
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.sub-title: S01 : E399 Second Chances S1 E399
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.sub-title: S04 : E91 Jodha Akbar S4 E91
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma learns the details of Dr. Faker’s diabolical plan to destroy Astral World! Can Yuma figure out a way to stop Faker, or is the future of Astral World a thing of the past?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of KaibaCorp trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game! Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can Yugi and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mai lose all their life points! Can Yugi and Kaiba, two former opponents, work together and face the biggest enemy of their lives?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: A new student, Duke Devlin, defeats Joey in a game of Duel Monsters, forcing Joey to become his servant. Duke forces Joey to wear a dog costume and humiliates him in public, forcing Yugi to challenge Duke to a duel. However, this will not be a Duel Monsters duel, but a new game named Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: In exchange for Joey’s freedom, Yugi agrees to give up Duel Monsters forever if he loses. Unfamiliar with the rules, Yugi gets off to a rough start. His chances do not improve as Duke reveals that he designed Dungeon Dice Monsters with Pegasus’s aid! Can Yugi learn the new complex rules, much less form a strategy, before he is soundly defeated?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi’s position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 4
programme.desc: After Duke’s all-powerful Orgoth the Relentless dices Yugi’s entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points! Yugi’s last hope rests in one final dice roll in the thrilling conclusion to Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 The Mystery Duelist, Part 1
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle, and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back! However, this is no ordinary soothsayer; he’s a familiar and formidable foe from Duelist Kingdom… or is he? Can Yugi beat him all alone without the help of his friends or the spirit inside the Puzzle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 The Mystery Duelist, Part 2
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze! Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 The Past Is Present
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed! Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago! The ancient games have resurrected in modern times, along with three almighty beasts of unstoppable devastation – the Egyptian God Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Téa is going to help him uncover the mysteries of his past! However, their search is interrupted by the dancing duelist Johnny Steps and his musical monsters of rock!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To face the future, Yugi must first look into the past! Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again! Meanwhile, Kaiba tests the hidden powers of his Egyptian God Card Obelisk the Tormentor against the fury of Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Stalked by the Rare Hunters
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel where if Joey loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes B. Dragon! Though Joey pummels his foes with his mighty monster armada, eliminating life points isn’t the only path to victory…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Yugi vs. Rare Hunter, Part 1: Battle City Begins
programme.desc: It’s time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey’s Red-Eyes B. Dragon. However, Yugi’s falling into the same trap that led to Joey’s demise!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Yugi vs. Rare Hunter, Part 2: Up Against Exodia
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter’s strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it’s too late to stop him! The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck! How can Yugi stop the unstoppable Exodia?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 The ESP Duelist, Part 1
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey’s next on his hit list! What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey’s hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 The ESP Duelist, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba’s extrasensory perception is a hoax, but he’s not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations! Espa Roba’s Jinzo not only slaughters all of Joey’s monsters, but it grows in power every turn! Joey’s luck has come to an end… or has it?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 The Master of Magicians, Part 1
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world’s most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm! Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 The Master of Magicians, Part 2
programme.desc: It’s Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck! Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up, as long as he believes in the heart of the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 The Master of Magicians, Part 3
programme.desc: To counter Arkana’s Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: Dark Magician Girl! It’s the battle of the sexes to determine the true master of magicians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 Playing With a Parasite, Part 1
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel! Weevil secretly infests Joey’s deck with a parasite that prevents Joey from summoning strong monsters! Without the support of his most powerful beasts, what chance does Joey have against a monster that even Yugi didn’t dare face at Duelist Kingdom: Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth!?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Playing With a Parasite, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes! Will Weevil’s royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik’s nefarious Rare Hunters – the silent but deadly Strings! Strings stops all of Yugi’s attacks with Revival Jam, a slippery slime that resurrects whenever it’s destroyed! How can Yugi win if he can’t even put a dent in Strings’s life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters... the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon! What chance does Yugi’s band of mortal monsters have against an Egyptian God?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spell Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand, so Strings’s Slifer the Sky Dragon can grow to infinite attack power! Can Yugi discover Slifer’s one fatal flaw before he’s annihilated by tens of thousands of attack points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts! If Joey wins, he’ll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye! However, little does Joey realize that he has bigger problems than this duel; the Rare Hunters are closing in on his location…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako’s oceanic warrior The Legendary Fisherman unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey’s monsters from the depths of the sea! Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he’s all washed out!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E21 Double Duel, Part 1: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Abductions abound! Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Téa! To make matters worse, the Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper! The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E22 Double Duel, Part 2: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba’s tumultuous teamwork! Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they’re sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Double Duel, Part 3: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it’s too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius, a monstrous menace even more powerful than Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Double Duel, Part 4: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior! However, little does Yugi know that Umbra and Lumis have one final mask to turn Yugi’s monsters against him…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Double Duel, Part 4: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior! However, little does Yugi know that Umbra and Lumis have one final mask to turn Yugi’s monsters against him…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends! But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they’ve faced… and will be facing in the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E26 Friends 'Til the End, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s friend vs. friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi! The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes! Can Yugi break Joey out of his spell, or will Joey break Yugi?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E27 Friends 'Til the End, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi’s life points, Yugi can’t bring himself to attack his dear friend! Yugi summons Joey’s favorite monster Red-Eyes B. Dragon to try to bring Joey back to his senses. Will seeing his favorite card help Joey break Marik’s spell, or is Yugi’s last ditch effort a lost cause?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E28 Friends 'Til the End, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik’s spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle! When Joey draws the card he needs to decimate Yugi’s life points, what chance does Yugi have, especially on his own?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E29 Friends 'Til the End, Part 4
programme.desc: There’s only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea! Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom? However, there may be a special savior who just regained her eyesight…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Shadow of a Duel
programme.desc: It’s the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz’s zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City Finals! But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It’s the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage! Will Mai succumb to Jean-Claude’s charm, not to mention his cadre of ninja monsters, or will she send him packing back to Tinseltown?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 Let the Finals Begin!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City Finals begin! The eight finalists will have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky! Yugi and friends finally meet the other finalists, but none of them are who they appear to be…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s the first duel of the Battle City Finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring that's possessing Bakura! Yugi quickly dispatches Bakura’s grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 2
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns! If that’s not bad enough, Bakura’s Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi’s life points every time Yugi attacks! Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi’s trapped!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E35 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi’s Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster! Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals, or will he surrender to save Bakura’s life but lose the only chance to protect the world from Marik’s evil?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E69 A Trio's Challenge - Part 1
programme.desc: Kite, Shark and Yuma join forces to take down Dr. Faker! Can this trio work together as a team and put an end to Faker’s fury, or will Faker and his deck prove to be too much of a challenge for these three fearless friends?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E70 A Trio's Challenge - Part 2
programme.desc: With the fate of Astral World hanging in the balance, Yuma, Kite and Shark set their sights on stopping Dr. Faker, but before our three heroes can make their final move, Dr. Faker reveals the shocking reason behind his diabolical plan!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E71 A Trio's Challenge - Part 3
programme.desc: When a mysterious being from Barian World appears, Yuma, Kite and Shark must work together and battle like never before if they want to save Hart, Astral World… and themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The stage is set for the ultimate battle between Yuma and Kite, but just when Yuma’s about to high five the sky, Kite brings him crashing down to earth with a startling revelation!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The back and forth battle between Kite and Yuma comes to an exciting conclusion that leaves one of our duelists down for the count! Will Yuma’s dream of pulling out a victory become a reality, or is Kite going to turn this dream into a nightmare?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E74 Attack of the Barians - Part 1
programme.desc: The Barian invasion begins! Yuma faces a dangerous new enemy who will go to any extreme to gain possession of Yuma’s Numbers in order to destroy Astral and his home!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E75 Attack of the Barians - Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma’s battle with a dangerous and powerful soldier of Barian World continues as he strives to keep Astral safe! Can Yuma beat this Barian enemy and his new Chaos Monster, or will Yuma end up losing what is most valuable to him… Astral?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: When pro duelist Devon Knox teaches a special class, Yuma gets taken to the school of hard knocks and learns a valuable lesson about the Barians he won’t soon forget!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Ray nominates Yuma to run against Caswell for the position of Class Representative, but when the Ray Way takes a turn for the worse, Yuma finds himself facing off against a Student Council President who’s been corrupted by the Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E78 The Adventures of Artimus Stanleyus
programme.desc: Shark gets hooked into a battle with the Barians when the President of the Comic Book Appreciation Club challenges him to a duel! Can Shark outdraw the competition, or will his Number and life points be erased?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Shark’s sister Rio makes a big splash on her first day at school, but not all the attention she gets is good, especially when she catches the eye of a Barian botanist!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E80 Rivals in the Ring
programme.desc: A new Barian threat arrives on the scene looking to take Yuma’s Numbers, but his plan gets tripped up when he falls head over heels for Tori!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E36 Rage of the Egyptian Gods
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed! The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E37 Awakening of Evil, Part 1
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City Finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion’s strategy that guarantees Joey victory… or is Joey falling into another trap?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Awakening of Evil, Part 2
programme.desc: Odion’s Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey’s monsters… and his life points! Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he already too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Awakening of Evil, Part 3
programme.desc: It’s a feeding frenzy as Odion’s Serket devours Joey’s monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Serket when it ingests Joey’s monsters whenever they’re summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E40 Awakening of Evil, Part 4
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster The Winged Dragon of Ra and targets it to annihilate the rest of Joey’s life points! However, is Odion able to control the ultimate power of an Egyptian God, or will The Winged Dragon of Ra punish all those unworthy of summoning it?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E41 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 1
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City Finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it’s a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing life points equals losing your memories! As Marik’s true sinister self comes to the surface, does Mai stand a chance against this malevolent evil?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 2
programme.desc: As Mai loses more and more of her memories under Marik’s relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends’ neverending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E43 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 3
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik’s The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she’s unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities! Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself and incinerates Mai with the full fury of The Winged Dragon of Ra?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 A Duel With Destiny: Kaiba Vs. Ishizu, Part 1
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City Finals, Kaiba’s mystery opponent is… Ishizu! With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play! Does Kaiba stand a chance against an opponent who knows his moves even before he does?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E45 A Duel With Destiny: Kaiba Vs. Ishizu, Part 2
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel – she will defeat Kaiba with her trap! How can Kaiba win when it’s already destined that he will lose? It’s time for Kaiba to change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik’s evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E47 Showdown in the Shadows: Marik Vs. Bakura, Part 1
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and the Millennium Ring, and the loser will be trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever! To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally in the form of… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E48 Showdown in the Shadows: Marik Vs. Bakura, Part 2
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm! But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba’s blimp speeds towards KaibaCorp Island for the final rounds of the Battle City Tournament, the ship is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen – five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba’s past who are out for revenge! With the power of cyberspace on Noah’s side, Yugi and friends are trapped inside a new and dangerous Duel Monsters game!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 1"
programme.desc: Noah displays the power of his virtual world by splitting up Yugi’s gang and flinging them into the far reaches of his self-created universe! The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley’s Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against Gansley, in the form of "Deepsea Warrior", but struggles with the complexities of the dueling field and the new rules. Tea faces peril from a vicious tribe of cyclopses while Kaiba and Mokuba are brought to a setting similar to their old orphanage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi's strategy is hindered by Gansley's Deck Master ability. Tristan and Duke face a mean dinosaur to save Serenity. Meanwhile, Kaiba and Mokuba confront painful visions of their miserable childhood, but within the heartache may lurk the key to Noah's true intentions.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Téa is led by a penguin to Crump, in the form of Nightmare Penguin, who challenges her to a duel. She learns immediately that dueling in the virtual realm differs starkly from her previous duels, and starts to succumb to the virtual playing field.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite gaining a lead with Maha Vailo, Téa falls behind as Crump begins an assault on her life points, causing the ice around her to grow. With the help of her Deck Master, Dark Magician Girl, and Yugi's Dark Magician, Téa gains enough confidence to win.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey faces the Big 5's lawyer, Johnson, in a courtroom duel. Joey pulls an early lead with his Deck Master, Flame Swordsman, but Johnson's Deck Master, Judge Man, has abilities of his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey attempts to pull through with several luck-based cards, but Johnson's cheating tactics ruin all his chances, until an angry Noah puts a stop to him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan, Duke and Serenity duel Nesbitt, the Big 5's mechanical expert. Serenity's lack of experience with the game and Nesbit's powerful machine monsters create a tragic end for Tristan.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Tristan gone and Serenity in shock, Duke attempts to defeat Nesbitt by himself. But when Orgoth the Relentless is destroyed by his Perfect Machine King, Duke tries to help Serenity regain confidence in her abilities. The two later remember Tristan's face down card, hoping it will help them win.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 Settling the Score — Part 1
programme.desc: As Nesbitt (in Tristan's body) kidnaps Mokuba, Kaiba is forced to duel Lector, the former assistant to his stepfather. For Lector, the duel is personal, as he plans to take what he believes is rightfully his—KaibaCorp. Meanwhile, Tristan rejoins the group; his friends do not recognize him, since his mind has been downloaded into a mechanical monkey.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 Settling the Score — Part 2
programme.desc: With Lector's Jinzo Deck Master destroying all of Kaiba's traps, Imperial Order destroying all his spell cards, and Lector's unreachable Satellite Cannon striking from space, Kaiba doesn't seem to stand a chance. Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba keeps him believing that his brother will pull out with a victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi, Kaiba, and Tea are separated from the others as the Big 5 (minus Nesbitt) plan to take their bodies anyway. As Noah tortures Kaiba by brainwashing Mokuba, he reveals his true identity as Gozaboro Kaiba's biological son.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E14 Merger of the Big Five — Part 1
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five, who are using Tristan's body.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 Merger of the Big Five — Part 2
programme.desc: The Big 5 attempt various strategies of victory, with the aim of eliminating Joey first. However, their poor teamwork soon puts Yugi and Joey ahead. Lector then calls their most powerful monster to the field, the Five Head Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 Merger of the Big Five — Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey are forced to use their strongest monsters to take down the Five-Headed Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E17 Brothers in Arms — Part 1
programme.desc: Kaiba and Noah duel for full control of KaibaCorp, but Noah's revelations and constant manipulation of the playing field complicate things for Kaiba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E18 Brothers in Arms — Part 2
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark puts Kaiba in a difficult position, as he scrambles to find a winning strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E19 Brothers in Arms — Part 3
programme.desc: Kaiba regains control of the duel, but Noah brings a brainwashed Mokuba out to hinder his plans. After finally breaking through to Mokuba, Kaiba tries to embrace his brother before Noah, jealous over their close relationship, turns them to stone.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E20 Noah's Final Threat — Part 1
programme.desc: Enraged at Noah's cruel games, Yugi takes over for Kaiba and duels Noah with only 400 life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E21 Noah's Final Threat — Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi's efforts to win the duel are further complicated by Noah, who turns all of his friends into stone statues, leaving Yugi feeling alone and without hope.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E22 So Close Yet So Far
programme.desc: Gozaboro Kaiba reveals himself and plans to virtualize the entire world to create a digital kingdom. With Noah's unlikely aid, Yugi and the others must escape while fending off memories from the past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E23 Burying the Past — Part 1
programme.desc: Using Mokuba's body, Noah escapes and sets the virtual world to self-destruct. But Mokuba's kindness breaks through his heart, and he tries to set the others free. Meanwhile, Kaiba duels Gozaboro, who summons a seemingly unstoppable monster—Exodia Necross.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E24 Burying the Past — Part 2
programme.desc: ami Marik destroys the computers in the control room, disabling the controls for the self-destruct mechanism, which turns the situation desperate. Meanwhile, Kaiba defeats Gozoboro Kaiba, and he and Yugi rush to the exit before the virtual world explodes. Noah erases Gozoboro's files and releases his mind, and finally makes peace with his family, and prepares for the destruction of the virtual world.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E25 Back to Battle City — Part 1
programme.desc: Yugi and the others arrive at KaibaCorp Island and The Battle City Finals resume. To decide who will duel whom, the four duelists--Yugi, Joey, Kaiba, and Marik-- face each other in a four-way duel in the Duel Tower.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E26 Back to Battle City — Part 2
programme.desc: The four-way duel continues with Joey determined to duel Marik in order to save Mai while Marik and Kaiba both intend to face Yugi. Meanwhile, Ishizu reflects on her past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E27 Back to Battle City — Part 3
programme.desc: With the conclusion of the four-way duel, the match-ups for the semi-finals are determined — Joey will duel Marik while Yugi will be facing off against Kaiba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E28 The Darkness Returns — Part 1
programme.desc: Marik brings Joey and himself to the Shadow Realm, where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters, suffering the pain that the monsters feel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E29 The Darkness Returns — Part 2
programme.desc: Marik's duel tactics eat away at Joey's deck and his life points. Joey's comeback strategy, however is hindered by Marik's new monster on Joey's side of the field.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: When Yuma’s buddies can’t stop bickering, it’s time for them to face-off in the Friendship Games, a sports dueling competition with surprises around every corner… including Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: When Yuma’s buddies can’t stop bickering, it’s time for them to face-off in the Friendship Games, a sports dueling competition with surprises around every corner… including Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E82 Sphere Cube Calamity - Part 1
programme.desc: A dangerous new Barian enemy arrives, and he’s bringing one of his world’s most powerful weapons to take down Yuma and Astral!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E83 Sphere Cube Calamity - Part 2
programme.desc: Mizar batters Yuma to his breaking point… until a surprise duelist steps in to take down Mizar and go claw-to-claw with his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: In order to set Yuma straight, Shark steals Yuma’s Key! Can Yuma find the courage to face Shark, or will Yuma’s fears leave him cowering for cover?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Let’s get ready to duuuuuuuuel! Yuma steps into the ring with Alito, but can he dodge this Barian’s Battlin’ Boxers before they send him to the canvas for a ten count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: It’s Round 2 of the heavyweight battle between Yuma and Alito! Can Yuma bob and weave his way around Alito’s attacks, or will this Barian’s fancy footwork finish him off for good?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Girag’s got revenge on his mind and Ray in his sights, but when Yuma steps in to save the day, the Ray Way steers Yuma off course!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Girag has Yuma and Ray in the palm of his hand, but will a secret that Ray has been keeping help our heroes escape the clutches of this Barian behemoth?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Astral and Yuma face a challenge so daunting that they must turn to their biggest adversary for help!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E90 You Give Love a Bot Name
programme.desc: When Orbital 7 crashes into Lillybot, it’s love at first sensor! So when he discovers his beloved bot is in trouble, he motors to free her from her tormentor… Yuma!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Shark’s trying to control Rio’s life, but she’s not taking it anymore! Will this family feud turn into a feeding frenzy for Shark, or will Rio put her brother’s winning streak on ice?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E92 An Imperfect Couple - Part 1
programme.desc: The gang’s dressed up as their favorite monsters for the school’s fun fair, but when Anna crashes the festivities, the party ends for Yuma!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E30 The Darkness Returns — Part 3
programme.desc: With life points dropping and his monsters unable to attack, Joey summons a monster that proves to be his saving grace, prompting Marik to unleash Ra.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E31 The Darkness Returns — Part 4
programme.desc: Despite surviving Marik's onslaught, Joey is weakened by the shadow game's effects and succumbs just as he is about to win the duel. Yugi struggles to find hope after losing his best friend to the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E32 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 1
programme.desc: The second duel of the semi-finals begins with Yugi dueling Kaiba for the second spot in the grand final and the chance to duel Marik. Kaiba draws Obelisk on his first turn, but Yugi thwarts his attempts to summon it with Lightforce Sword.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E33 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 2
programme.desc: Kaiba and Yugi compete to summon their monsters to the field, but each is hindered by the other's strategies.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E34 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 3
programme.desc: Kaiba is able to summon Obelisk the Tormentor, to the field, putting it at odds with Yugi's own Slifer the Sky Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E35 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 4
programme.desc: With the destruction of both their monsters, Kaiba and Yugi are presented with a vision of the High Priest's legendary battle against the Pharaoh. Kaiba believes this to be a mere illusion, but Yugi knows that it is a vision of the past. The duel continues with Kaiba and Yugi attacking with their signature cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E36 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 5
programme.desc: Kaiba gains a lead in the duel when he summons three Blue Eyes White Dragons. Yugi's hopes of winning come to an end, but receives some encouragement from Joey and stays strong in the game. Meanwhile, Joey's dreams and the ongoing duel cause Joey to awake.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E37 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 6
programme.desc: Kaiba's final move forces the duelists to use only three cards, forcing to use the best cards in the decks to win the duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E38 Battle for the Bronze — Part 1
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's constant ridicule, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City tournament.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E39 Battle for the Bronze — Part 2
programme.desc: Joey manages to gain one of Kaiba's strongest cards to help him advance in the duel. Meanwhile, Téa – possessed by the good half of Marik's soul – fights Yami Marik for control of the Millennium Rod.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E40 Battle for the Bronze — Part 3
programme.desc: After defeating Joey and taking third place in the tournament, Kaiba plans to destroy the Duel Tower and bury his past forever. Ishizu and Mokuba convince him otherwise, and he gives Yugi one all-powerful card that could give him a chance to defeat Marik in the final duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E41 The Final Face Off — Part 1
programme.desc: The final duel of Battle City begins. Yami Marik quickly turns it into a shadow game and sets it up so that if he or the Pharaoh loses, their host's soul will be destroyed. Yugi convinces the Pharaoh not to worry about him and to keep dueling to save Mai, Bakura and the good Marik. Yami Marik quickly discards his Winged Dragon of Ra to the graveyard, planning to revive it. Yugi manages to summon Slifer the Sky Dragon using his three Knights.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E42 The Final Face Off — Part 2
programme.desc: Marik uses Ra's effect to destroy Slifer and revives it once again to attack Yugi. Yugi plays the card Kaiba gave him, Fiend's Sanctuary, to stop Marik's attack. He then uses Multiply in order to summon Obelisk the Tormentor and devastate Marik.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E43 The Final Face Off — Part 3
programme.desc: Marik's good half possesses Tea again and begs Yugi to destroy him along with his evil side,but he eventually weakens and begins fading away as his dark half loses life points. Yugi and the Pharaoh become hesitant to duel, not wanting to harm the good Marik. As he fades away, Marik appears to an unconscious Odion, thanks him for taking care of him and apologizes, wishing that he could take back his cruel actions. In a cliffhanger, Odion is revealed to have been awakened by Marik's apology.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E44 The Final Face Off — Part 4
programme.desc: Yugi continues fending off Marik's attacks, holding out until he has the cards he needs to defeat Marik. Finally, he summons Dark Magician and Dark Magician Girl and uses them to activate Ragnarok – a spell card with the ability to destroy all the monsters on Marik's field, including The Winged Dragon of Ra that he fused himself with. (The card actually negates and removes all cards Marik controls, at the cost of banishing all monsters to the graveyard that Yami Yugi has.) But Yami Marik claims that if Ra is destroyed (which will leave the good Marik with only 1 life point), then the good Marik will be too weak to resist the power of the Shadow Realm, and will consequently lose his soul....

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E45 The Final Face Off — Part 5
programme.desc: Odion tries to get the good Marik to resist his evil half. As a result, Yami Marik becomes angered, and attacks Odion with the Millennium Rod, which weakens Odion even more. Odion doesn't give up, despite Ishizu's protests. As Marik continues his onslaught (which begins to injure Odion), Odion tells Marik's good side that together, they had conquered his evil half before, and that they could do it again. Then, he tells the good Marik that since Yami Marik was created by the good Marik's hatred, he has the power to destroy him. As Yami Marik raises the Rod to deliver the final blow, the good Marik disappears from the field, and begins fighting against Yami Marik, who struggles for control...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E46 One for the Road
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang escape from the island in time, but they are forced to leave Kaiba and Mokuba behind. The brothers get away just as the island explodes using the Blue-Eyes White Jet. Yugi's group heads back to Domino City, where they say their farewells and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E47 Looking Back and Moving Ahead
