programme.desc: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: Tony's son David is shocked when his friend Jason shoots Brad Harris, the school bully. What follows is a crisis of conscience.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: When one of Eastbridge's most powerful socialities, is murdered, it is discovered she has been running a call girl service and one name on her list of clients is Commissioner Scali!

programme.title: The Commish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 The Witches Of Eastbridge
programme.desc: As Halloween approaches, a heart is cut from the body of a corpse at a funeral home and concerned Eastbridge parents pressure Tony to protect their children from the suspect, an eccentric recluse.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 The Two Faces Of Ed
programme.desc: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 A Time To Be Born
programme.desc: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Love, Hate And Sporty James
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall try to protect their informant, Sporty James, after he blackmails a ruthless cocaine dealer.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 The Cradle Will Rock
programme.desc: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The malicious leader of paramilitary neo-Nazis take Hunter and McCall captive while planning their next attack

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter goes to Australia to help solve a murder involving a former girlfriend who's been missing for 3 years.

programme.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
programme.desc: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When crooked Circuit Prosecutor Eli Starke hires some local thugs to thwart the efforts of a group of ex-convicts trying to go straight, Reno comes to their rescue.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno's old friend, D.A. Harry Wells, recruits him to help find his daughter Dawn, who is being held hostage by her drug-dealing boyfriend.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: A ghost from Reno's past appears and convinces him that his older brother Mitch, who went MIA over Cambodia 17 years ago and whom the government declared dead, is still alive.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno's only means of saving himself and his brother is to break the psychological hold that Bracket's lies have over Mitch by reminding him of their past.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.

programme.title: Utah Blaine
programme.desc: Gunslinger Utah Blaine rescues rancher Joe Neal from lynching by vigilante land-grabbers and runs afoul of vigilante leader Russ Nevers' interests.

programme.title: Ben and Charlie
programme.desc: Two likable bandits try to make a living in the Old West.

programme.title: Alien Thunder
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice (Gordon Tootoosis), a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: Texas, Adios
programme.desc: A Texas sheriff and his younger brother travel across the Mexican border to confront the man who killed their father.

programme.title: The Grand Duel
programme.desc: A grizzled ex-sheriff helps a man framed for murder to confront the powerful trio of brothers who want him dead.

programme.title: Pancho Villa
programme.desc: A double-cross in an arms deal prompts Mexican revolutionary Pancho Villa to raid a US Army weapons depot in Columbus, New Mexico.

programme.title: Adventures of Gallant Bess
programme.desc: Ted Daniels, a ranch hand working for a rodeo, captures a magnificent wild horse that he tames and trains. As Ted is recovering from an accident that happened during a rodeo, the rodeo owner cheats him out of his horse.

programme.title: Now They Call Him Sacramento
programme.desc: While an infamous gunslinger saves farmers from people trying to exploit them, he falls in love with a beautiful widow.

programme.title: Find a Place to Die
programme.desc: An outcast Confederate soldier redeems himself by defending a woman against bandits willing to kill for her goldmine claim.

programme.title: Paid in Blood
programme.desc: Jeff Cameron is Tom Carter and he’s a man on a mission to get revenge for his brother Jerry, who was gunned down after pulling his life savings out of the Rio Canyon town bank.

programme.title: Tequila Joe
programme.desc: A young deputy tries to sober and revitalize a washed up, alcoholic sheriff to take down a pair of warring gangs of criminals in the Old West.

programme.title: No Killing Without Dollars
programme.desc: Lawrence White returns to Owell Rock seeking revenge for his father’s murder. To protect his identity and strategy, he adopts a new name and hires another man to impersonate Lawrence White, setting a dangerous game of deception and vengeance in motion.

programme.title: Duel in the Sun
programme.desc: After her father is executed, Pearl Chavez moves in with distant relatives in Texas. While Laura Belle and Jesse welcome her, the ranch’s patriarch despises her, and rebellious son Lewt becomes dangerously obsessed. As Pearl is torn between desire and danger, family tensions explode around her.

programme.title: Bad Man's River
programme.desc: Robber Roy King loses his wife, Alicia, to revolutionary Montero. Despite their rivalry they collaborate in an attempt to rob the Mexican government of one million dollars.

programme.title: Halleluja and Sartana Strike Again
programme.desc: Two charming conmen—one posing as a missionary—set out to swindle a church group but end up clashing with a gang of greedy landgrabbers. In this slapstick western, the schemers unexpectedly turn into heroes as they help protect the townsfolk from losing everything.

programme.title: Beyond The Law
programme.desc: A trio of thieves plot to steal a town's silver shipment but a turn of events makes them the town's heroes.

programme.title: Long Live ... Your Death!
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed Russian prince, a Mexican bandit and a radical Irish female journalist team up during the Mexican Revolution to find fortune and notoriety.

programme.title: Six Bounty Killers for a Massacre
programme.desc: The Governor of Kansas hires six gunfighters to overthrow the tyrannical rule of the self-appointed sheriff of Abilene who is holding several hostages including his family.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: A local sheriff is unjustly accused of murder in a small town and forced to flee.

programme.title: Comanche
programme.desc: Common efforts of the U.S. government and the Comanche nation to negotiate a peace treaty are sabotaged by renegade Indians and by the short-sighted Indian Commissioner.

programme.title: The Cry of the Black Wolves
programme.desc: Halfwit Indian Akaena promises a fictitious treasure to anyone who takes her down south where the sun always shines.

programme.title: The Over the Hill Gang
programme.desc: A retired Texas Ranger and his three aging pals are hired to clean up a lawless town.

programme.title: Heroes of Fort Worth
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a group of confederate soldiers with the help of Apache Indians, try to defeat a Union fort, while trying to gain support from Emperor Maximillian of Mexico.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it by escorting the funeral procession through dangerous Indian territory.

programme.title: Captain Apache
programme.desc: A Native American born US Army officer, Captain Apache, investigating a murder, uncovers a presidential assassination plot.

programme.title: The Great Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: A blind man wants to get his mitts on a crooks' gold. He can't do it alone, so he hires the quartet of soldiers-of-fortune to help him.

programme.title: One Dollar Too Many
programme.desc: Suave gambler Clay Watson, cocky sharpshooter Moses Lang, and wily thespian Edwin Kean are a trio of criminals in the Old West.

programme.title: White Apache
programme.desc: Outlaws attack a band of settlers and kill everyone except a pregnant woman who's rescued by a band of Indians. The woman dies giving birth but Chief White Bear adopts her male baby, naming him "Shining Sky," and raising him as brother to his own son, Black Wolf.

programme.title: Little Big Horn
programme.desc: In 1876 Montana, Capt. Phillip Donlin’s duty in the Great Sioux Wars strains his marriage as his wife, Celie, has an affair with Lt. Haywood. Overhearing their plans to flee, Donlin is heartbroken but continues his mission to warn General Custer of a massive Sioux buildup. Defying orders, he presses on, racing against time to reach Custer before disaster strikes.

programme.title: Sugar Colt
programme.desc: In order to avenge a friend and to fulfill his last wish, Rocco has to find out what happened to an army corps that has mysteriously disappeared. He therefore puts on the disguise of a doctor and starts investigating in a somewhat uncomfortable town.

programme.title: Three Graves for a Winchester
programme.desc: Ringo Carson has a tough life. First, he has a falling out with his best friend, Frank Sanders, after saving Jane, the girl he loves, from Mexican kidnappers in order to extort a ransom from her gunrunner father.

programme.title: The Last Traitor
programme.desc: Ned Carter is waiting with a bunch of guests for his bride. When they notice there are exactly 13 people at the table, an unlucky number, some think it's an evil omen.

programme.title: The Bushwhackers
programme.desc: An evil arthritic rancher and his murderous daughter are having settlers killed to prevent them from selling their land to the railroad.

programme.title: Scalps
programme.desc: The commander of a Texan fort in the Civil War refuses to surrender to the Northerners, and tries to buy the local Indian tribe chief's daughter. The sage man refuses, and the Southerners massacre the tribe and abduct the young squaw anyway. The noble squaw manages to escape, and hides out with a rough rancher, who dislikes Indians, but hates the Southerners more. The odd couple joins forces, and tactics, to exert ultimate vengeance on the men at the fort.

programme.title: He Is Mine
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. When his wife is kidnapped, Akin Richard’s life takes a terrible turn and he slips into depression. His revival and will to live comes from the love and affection from Sandra’s half-sister, Angela. After one year of mourning and sorrowing, they fall in love, and encouraged by the family, they get married. Akin is overjoyed until he receives a call that Sandra has been rescued alive; she is not dead after all.

programme.title: AMC Movie Talk S7 - Sandra Eze
programme.desc: Join AMC as we speak to some of Nollywood's movers and shakers, including actors, directors, producers etc, and get some behind-the-scenes insight on their work.

programme.title: Make It Or Break It
programme.desc: There is chaos all round when a phone call to a radio show brings light to infidelity & betrayal previously hidden. Henry opens the can of worms when he encourages Kiki, his attractive neighbour, to call into his popular radio show, Make It Or Break It.

programme.title: 30s, Single & Bored Ep9
programme.desc: Set in Lagos, Nigeria, the series tells the story of single and married women in the city. It explores how they perceive and view each other, which has led to unspoken conflicts between the two groups. One group believes itself superior to the other due to its status.

programme.title: 30s, Single & Bored Ep10
programme.desc: Set in Lagos, Nigeria, the series tells the story of single and married women in the city. It explores how they perceive and view each other, which has led to unspoken conflicts between the two groups. One group believes itself superior to the other due to its status.

programme.title: Frenemy
programme.desc: In the process of divorcing her husband, Peggy moves out of the house to start a new life and, hopefully, to forget all about the opposite gender, but life has other plans for her.

programme.title: Wake Up
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Unaware that she is about to be battered by reality, a naïve girl breaks her vow of chastity after she falls in love with the man of her dreams. She must now bear the consequence of her self-betrayal and make a choice that will define the rest of her life.

programme.title: In Bloom - Alta
programme.desc: A collection of 5 short films addressing gender equality issues such as period poverty, child marriage, gender-based violence, HIV and economic empowerment. Second Short: "Alta", written and directed by Priyanka Banerjee (India). A defiant teenager refusing to come out of the bathroom forces her helpless father to seek help to reason with the girl, but things take a turn when their true relationship is revealed.

programme.title: AMC Movie Talk S7 - Sandra Eze
programme.desc: Join AMC as we speak to some of Nollywood's movers and shakers, including actors, directors, producers etc, and get some behind-the-scenes insight on their work.

programme.title: 31 Days
programme.desc: Two young corpers find themselves in the unknown when they are assigned to a small village for their youth service and try to teach new ways of doing things that defy the village's traditions.

programme.title: In Bloom - Mare
programme.desc: A collection of 5 short films addressing gender equality issues such as period poverty, child marriage, gender-based violence, HIV and economic empowerment. Third Short: "Maré", written and directed by Giuliana Monteiro (Brazil). A mother on the edge of her sanity seeks solace from a tumultuous life situation.

programme.title: Love Box
programme.desc: Two long-term unmarried lovers relocate to Lagos for greener pastures and experience relationship with other people before settling down. Their affair relationship becomes threatened as they begin to make new friends and discover new lifestyles.

programme.title: Zuriel's Diary
programme.desc: A heart-breaking family secret is unearthed when words in a diary come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Samantha
programme.desc: An estranged couple decide to get together, along with their new partners, to discuss the custody and well-being of the estranged couple's daughter, Samantha. Things start to go awry as old wounds are reopened and old feelings, good and bad start to resurface.

programme.title: The Governor's Daughter
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. A high-flying woman, Mrs. Helen Onoja, is fixated on making sure her only son, Felix, not only marries from a class as high as hers, but specifically a governor’s daughter. She goes all out to arrange for him to date the spoilt daughter of her childhood friend, whose father happens to be the incumbent governor of Kogi State, ignoring the fact that Felix is in love with another woman, Abike. Meanwhile Felix’s relationship with Abike suffers because he is unable to stand up to his domineering mother.

programme.title: Undoing Perfect
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Jude, Theresa and their beautiful daughter Uju seem like the perfect family, but Theresa has a dark secret which she does everything to protect. Everything changes when Uju falls ill and requires immediate blood transfusion. Jude gets the shock of his life as he realizes he is not Uju’s father. "Undoing perfect" is a contemporary story of love, trust, betrayal and hurt, a sincere story of love and marriage.

programme.title: Finding Faith
programme.desc: Two couples with two different life challenges are tested in their marriages and their faith in God. They have to dig deeper into their strength to stay on the right path when faced with a so-called 'Man Of God'.

programme.title: The Underhand
programme.desc: A woman bound by naivety and traditions continues to defend her husband even when he does all manner of evil to her.

programme.title: AMC Music Lounge S7 - Guchi
programme.desc: AMC Music Lounge returns for its seventh season bringing you some new interviews, new live performances, fun musical games, and many more from legendary and emerging artistes.

programme.title: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Victor decides to take drastic action when mistreatment from his boss, Mr Okeke, becomes too much to bear. He decides to steal from the man but things get complicated when he finds Mr Okeke’s heavily pregnant wife at home instead of cash.

programme.title: Love Is A Trickster
programme.desc: A tomboy explores feminine ways to win back her man, but an unexpected guest poses a new interest.

programme.title: Forever Is A Lie
programme.desc: Jason and Ivy are a young couple and partners in love and in crime as they get money from commiting fraudulent activities against unsuspecting victims, however things start to go wrong when jealousy seeps in and one of them takes things too far.

programme.title: Scars Ep 15
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 16
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Lurk
programme.desc: A woman dedicated to her work is unaware that she has made enemies who would stop at nothing to see her dead.

programme.title: Entangled
programme.desc: A once happy marriage starts to face crisis when the husband is promoted and starts having more responsibility at work, leaving his wife to believe he is now neglecting his family responsibilities.

programme.title: Sweet Pain
programme.desc: A man working hard to provide for his family faces conflict with his girlfriend when she tries to come in between him and his friend and business partner.

programme.title: Dark Horse
programme.desc: Imelda's father vehemently disapproves of her relationahip with her new boyfriend, causing a rift within their family. Is he just over-protective or is there something more sinister behind his behaviour?

programme.title: Fallen Out
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Pascal is a loving husband and father, but with his wife working in Canada, he feels like a single father to their twin teenage daughters, Rachel and Vivian. With no proper supervision the girls get up to no good behind their father’s back and when he tries to discipline them, they do the unthinkable in an effort to escape the boundaries set.

programme.title: Scars Ep 13
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 14
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Shaffy's Sister
programme.desc: Shaffy’s sister, Daisy, struggles to interact with her family and find her place in society after spending years in prison.

programme.title: Bitter Love
programme.desc: Jordan, a notorious playboy is faced with an unexpected ultimatum. To claim his inheritance, he must do the one thing he swore he’d never do, get married. Forced to trade his bachelor antics for a life of commitment, Jordan scrambles to find the perfect partner but soon realises that love, and marriage, isn’t as simple as sealing a deal.

programme.title: The Missing Heirloom
programme.desc: A very expensive family heirloom goes missing and now Detective Lazarus must find it before he loses his own life.

programme.title: Fashion Insider - Hawa Magaji
programme.desc: Discover new designers, trends, styles, and more at Fashion Insider. Elileojo Achebo provides you with the opportunity to gain firsthand knowledge of the African stylists of the moment.

programme.title: Pains Of Rhoda
programme.desc: A woman whose husband is sterile goes through a lot of emotional ups and downs as she tries to console him during their trying time but, his trust issues causes more problems instead.

programme.title: 30s, Single & Bored Ep11
programme.desc: Set in Lagos, Nigeria, the series tells the story of single and married women in the city. It explores how they perceive and view each other, which has led to unspoken conflicts between the two groups. One group believes itself superior to the other due to its status.

programme.title: 30s, Single & Bored Ep12
programme.desc: Set in Lagos, Nigeria, the series tells the story of single and married women in the city. It explores how they perceive and view each other, which has led to unspoken conflicts between the two groups. One group believes itself superior to the other due to its status.

programme.title: Lethal Obsession
programme.desc: Oma's relationship with her boss becomes increasingly complicated as a small crush develops into something far more deadly.

programme.title: Unbridled
programme.desc: Yinka, a playboy, is only interested in an open marriage with a wife who will never question his moves or affairs with other women, and he, in return, wouldn’t care about what his wife does. Taking unusual steps in his search, he meets Bisola, a gorgeous woman who is happy with the terms, not knowing she is in love with someone else. As time goes on, Yinka starts to fall in love with Bisola but she reminds him of their terms, causing Yinka to want a review on their original arrangement.

programme.title: Fashion Insider - Hawa Magaji
programme.desc: Discover new designers, trends, styles, and more at Fashion Insider. Elileojo Achebo provides you with the opportunity to gain firsthand knowledge of the African stylists of the moment.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery. In this episode, Judge Bean discovers that a young vagabond he jailed for a minor offense may be involved in a major unsolved gold heist.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery. In this episode, a con involving the Haunted Hills draws Judge Roy's attention. Letty is among those who undergo hypnosis to recall long past events.

programme.title: Colorado Sundown
programme.desc: Murder among ranchers is the subject of this Republic Pictures drama. Starring such names as Rex Allen, Slim Pickins, and Chester Clute, this feature was directed by William Whitney. For Trivia Buffs: At one time Whitney was known as the youngest director in Hollywood, having been hired by the newly formed Republic Pictures at the tender age of 21.

programme.title: Cowboy and the Senorita
programme.desc: Roy Rogers and Trigger get top billing in this one, while the senorita of the title, Dale Evans, is billed fourth. Maybe Dale needed a better agent! Then again, who pays attention to screen credits when you have such a funfilled fiesta of thrills and action? Roys most zestful musical adventure is about a worthless gold mine that turns out to have a hidden shaft filled with riches. But can Roy make the claim while hes trying to outrun a trumped up robbery charge? Its romance, rhythm, and revelry, all from Republic Pictures. Musical numbers include Bunk House Bugle Boy and Besame Mucho, plus the beautiful title song performed by Roy!

programme.title: Crashing Thru
programme.desc: Down the danger trail sweeps a crimson fury... as Renfrew rides again! In this action-packed adventure, Sgt. Renfrew must face off against a group of criminals involved in a gold robbery. With his partner, Constable Kelly, wounded in a gunfight, Renfrew must stop the thieves on his own. Directed by Elmer Clifton; starring James Newill and Warren Hull, this is one adventure you won't want to miss!

programme.title: Northwest Trail
programme.desc: Mountie Matt OBrien assignment is simple: He is to escort the rather grouchy, and slightly annoying, Miss Katherine Owens to a remote outpost. Things complicate however when they arrive at the outpost and he stumbles upon an illegal mining operation. Stars include Bob Steele, Joan Woodbury, and Poodles Hanneford.

programme.title: Winds of the Wasteland
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this Republic Pictures western about the final days of the Pony Express. Former rider John Blair (Wayne) enters a coach race to win a $25,000 government mail contract, but there are dozens of obstacles in his path. The rest of the cast includes Lane Chandler and Phyllis Fraser, plus Lew Kelly (Lady of Burlesque) doing a great comic turn as Rocky OBrien, the eccentric, self-proclaimed mayor of a deserted mining town.

programme.title: Man from Utah
programme.desc: WHIRLING ROPES AND SNARLING GUNS IN THE GALLOPING GRIP OF A GLAMOROUS DRAMA! John Wayne stars as John Weston, a man hired to investigate shady doings at a local rodeo. It seems all the riders who are on the verge of winning end up dead. Along with Wayne, this tale of action on the range also stars the usual Lone Star Picture stock company, including Gabby Hayes and Yakima Canutt!

programme.title: The Dawn Rider
programme.desc: John Wayne was still a few years from major stardom when he appeared as John Mason, a man seeking revenge for his fathers murder. Marion Burns stars as Alice, Masons love interest, while Reed Howes stars as Masons friend and rival for Alices affection. When Mason finally tracks down the man responsible for his fathers death, will Ben help, or stand in his way? Produced by Lone Star Pictures, the group behind many of Waynes early films, The Dawn Rider is a stirring yarn about the price of vengeance.

programme.title: Courageous Avenger
programme.desc: Gold, gangs, and the heroic fight for life! Johnny Mack Brown (Billy the Kid, Coquette) stars in this western thriller about murders going on in a mining community. Its a story full of twists, where the greed for gold is only surpassed by the struggle for life!

programme.title: The Fighting Westerner
programme.desc: A mining engineer tries to solve the murders of several heirs to a valuable radium mine in this western drama from Paramount Pictures. Stars include Charles Chic Sale, and in one of his early roles, Randolph Scott. This feature, also known as Rocky Mountain Mystery, was directed by Oscar winner Charles Barton, who would go on to direct several popular television shows, including Petticoat Junction and Family Affair...

programme.title: Doomed Caravan
programme.desc: Hoppy is enlisted to help protect Jane Travers' next caravan against robbers who have been terrorizing travelers. He comes across a wily pair of thieves who hve their men disguised as soldiers to escort the caravan. Hoppy isn't fooled for a second and busts up their plan with help from the Bar 20 boys. Not to be outdone, the thieves then capture everyone but Hoppy and puts them before a firing squad. Not it's up to Hoppy to rescue his friends singlehandedly. The cast includes William Boyd as Hopalong Cassidy, with Russell Hayden and Andy Clyde as Luky Jenkins and California Jack. For those counting, this was the 32nd of 66 Hopalong Cassidy adventures. They would be edited for syndication...

programme.title: Neath Canadian Skies
programme.desc: It's the mounties versus claim jumpers in this drama from Golden Gate Pictures. Based on an action-packed novel by James Oliver Curwood and directed by B. Reeves Maynard (Undersea Kingdom, The Phantom Empire), the film features an outstanding cast of Poverty Row regulars, including Russell Hayden, Inez Cooper, Cliff Nazarro, I. Stanford Jolley, and Kermit Maynard. For movie buffs: Cinematographer Marcel Le Picard began his career in the silent era and finished with exactly 200 credits!

programme.title: Law of the Pampas
programme.desc: Murder below the Equator...and Hopalong Cassidy races to action in the heart of the wild Pampas country !Hoppy (William Boyd) and his pal Lucky (Russell Hayden) head to South America to look after a herd of cattle sold by Cassidy's boss to an Argentine rancher. Unfortunately, the scoundrel Ralph Merritt (Sidney Blackmer) wants the cattle, and he's not above hiring some dangerous characters to do his dirty work. It's a test of blazing guns...under a blazing sun! Can the boys of Bar 20 lay down the law in a lawless place like the Pampas? Can Hoppy and his gang succeed in what is truly a last frontier? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hellgate (Edited Version)
programme.desc: In 1867 Kansas, veterinarian Sterling Hayden treats an injured stranger who turns out to have been a guerrilla raider--and Hayden soon finds himself serving a term in one of the world's most terrifying prisons under sadistic commandant Ward Bond. Adapted from the story of Dr. Mudd, the physician who attended John Wilkes Booth, assassin of President Lincoln.

programme.title: Ridin' the Lone Trail
programme.desc: Sam Newfield directs this Western about a group of outlaws who are robbing stagecoaches while being led by a mysterious outlaw on a beautiful white horse. Bob McArthur (Bob Steele) arrives to help and makes a shocking discovery when he follows the white horse to the outlaws hideout. This B-Western, one of a long line of Sam Newfield efforts, also stars Claire Rochelle and Charles King (who has over 400 acting credits to his name, beginning with The Birth of a Nation in 1915 and ending in 1957 (his death)!

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: A rancher is shot dead after discovering oil on his property. Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog..The show was nominated for a PrimeTime Emmy Award in 1951 .It was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt. This episode aired in 1950.

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: An ex-con is released from prison seeking vengeance against those who put him there. Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog. The show was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt, and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1951 This episode first aired in 1950.

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho work to uncover a cattle rustling operation.Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog..The show was nominated for a PrimeTime Emmy Award in 1951. This episode aired in 1950. The show was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt.

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho investigate when a railway detective is found dead.Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog. The show was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt, and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1951 This episode first aired in 1950.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Quantrill and His Raiders
programme.desc: Jim Davis stars as Matt Clark, a railroad detective tasked with the mission to infiltrate the Quantrill gang before the Lawrence Kansas massacre.This western adventure series earned a Primetime Emmy in 1955.. Starring Jim Davis and Mary Castle. Plus, Bruce Bennet stars as Quantrill, with Steve Darrell as Bloody Bill Anderson.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Detectives Matt and Frankie investigate a woman named Cattle Kate who seems to be the source of cattle ranches suffering major losses in Sweetwater, Wyoming.This western adventure series earned a Primetime Emmy in 1955.. Starring Jim Davis and Mary Castle. Cattle Kate: Jean Parker. Episode first aired in 1954.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Detective Frankie finds herself caught in the middle of a train heist led by the Sam Bass gang.In order to get to Sam, she pretends to be a waitress and flirts with one of his henchmen. This western adventure series earned a Primetime Emmy in 1955..Directed by William Witney. Starring Jim Davis and Mary Castle. Don Haggerty plays Sam Bass, while Denver Pyle is his henchman, Bill Hayes.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Jim Davis stars as Matt Clark, a detective who faces the notorious gunslinger Johnny Ringo after finding him responsible for a train robbery. Directed by William Witney. Also starring Mary Castle. Donald Curtis, Emlen Davis, Lee Roberts, Harry Lauter, and Ralph Sanford. Directed by William Witney. Episode originally aired March 4, 1954.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After Farmer Perkins murders a store clerk in front of his wife, and is allowed to walk after his trial, the Cartwright's step in to make sure he'll be rearrested, tried, and hung.Starring Michael Landon as Joe, Dan Blocker as Hoss, Lorne Green as Ben, and Pernell Roberts as Adam. This beloved western drama ran for 14 seasons on NBC. Created by David Dortort.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After the Virginia City bank is robbed by an outlaw gang, the gangs youngest member gets a job on the Ponderosa. Initially welcomed, Little Joe becomes suspicious of Ponderosas newest member.Starring Michael Landon as Joe, Dan Blocker as Hoss, Lorne Green as Ben, and Pernell Roberts as Adam. This beloved western drama ran for 14 seasons on NBC. Created by David Dortort.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After a U.S. deputy marshal saves Adam's life from two gunmen, he explains that he is in town to bring a close friend of the Cartwright's to San Francisco to testify in a statewide racketeering trial, but the Deputy Marshal's motives for the witness soon become suspicious.Starring Michael Landon as Joe, Dan Blocker as Hoss, Lorne Green as Ben, and Pernell Roberts as Adam. This beloved western drama ran for 14 seasons on NBC. Created by David Dortort. From 1960.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: With Tom Edwards ranch going to waste since his becoming a paraplegic following an accident with Ben, Ben makes a business proposition: The Cartwrights will build a mill on Edwards land. In return, Ben requests that he earn his investment money back as well as fifteen percent. The deal is made, but suspicions of Edwards accident bring tension to Ponderosa and put their agreement at risk.Starring Michael Landon as Joe, Dan Blocker as Hoss, Lorne Green as Ben, and Pernell Roberts as Adam. This beloved western drama ran for 14 seasons on NBC. Created by David Dortort.

programme.title: Hands Across The Border
programme.desc: Roy Rogers and Trigger star in this Republic Pictures western about horse breeders vying for a contract with the U.S. Army. The cast also includes such favorites as Onslow Stevens and Guinn Big Boy Williams, while songs include Hey Hey (It's a Great Day), Dreaming to Music, and The Girl with the High Button Shoes. For movie buffs: The music for the title song, Hands Across the Border, was composed by none other than Hoagy Carmichael!

programme.title: Prairie Pals
programme.desc: IT'S A MODERN GOLD RUSH GANGSTER STYLE! But Three Ridin' Singin' Fightin' Buckaroos Stop 'Em Cold! The Prairie Pals are on the lookout for Wainwright, a scientist who has gone missing after discovering a way to turn vanadium ore into gold. The Prairie Pals start their search at Hank Stoners land, where the vanadium ore can be found. Directed by Sam Newfield; starring Bill Cowboy Rambler Boyd, Art Davis, and Lee Powell.

programme.title: Young Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: Roy Rogers stars in this highly fictionalized account of Bill Cody's life from director Joseph Kane (Dakota, Flame of Barbary Coast). What it lacks in accuracy is made up for with adventure, as well as and some of Roy's great cowboy songs, including 'Blow Breeze Blow', and 'Rollin' Down to Santa Fe'. Other stars include George 'Gabby' Hayes, Chief Thundercloud, and the lovely Pauline Moore (Young Mr. Lincoln, Charlie Chan at Treasure Island)

programme.title: Buffalo Stampede
programme.desc: A big time cast, including Randolph Scott, Buster Crabbe, Barton MacLane, and Harry Carey star in this feature about stampedes, Indian attacks, and plundering thieves! Directed by the esteemed Henry Hathaway (True Grit, Niagara).

programme.title: Yellowneck
programme.desc: Location shooting in the Florida Everglades add to this dramatic tale of five Confederate deserters trying to get to Cuba. First, they must overcome snake bites, unfriendly Seminoles, and their own conflicts with each other. How many of the five will actually make it out alive? Lin McCarthy, Stephen Courtleigh, and Berry Kroeger star in this little known example of 1950s independent filmmaking.

programme.title: Hell Town
programme.desc: In Hell Town (aka Born to the West) John Wayne is back in the saddle as two-fisted Dare Rudd, a roaming cowhand trying to prove he can win a woman's love and outwit a crooked saloon owner. This exciting B-movie from Paramount Pictures was based on a novel by western writer Zane Grey. With a wild and wooly cast that includes Johnny Mack Brown, Marsha Hunt, Monte Blue, and Lucian Littlefield, director Charles Barton (Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein) gives us a tale of romance, action, and high stakes gambling!

programme.title: Blue Steel
programme.desc: Undercover US Marshal John Carruthers (John Wayne) is investigating a rash of robberies by a character known as The Polka Dot Bandit in this B-movie gem. Along the way, Carruthers finds himself in more trouble than he'd ever expected! Written and directed by Robert N. Bradbury, the film features George Gabby Hayes, Eleanor Hunt, and many other favorites of the era. Wayne was only 27 at the time of Blue Steel, but was well on his way to becoming The Duke.

programme.title: Lost Canyon
programme.desc: When Johnny Travers (Jay Kirby) is falsely accused of robbing a bank, it's up to Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) to clear his name and find the real villains. There's nothing better than watching Hoppy get rough with the rustlers, and it's all the better when you get to hear the Sportsmen Quartette sing (I got Spurs) Jingle, Jangle, Jingle.

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: Oscar winner Michael Curtiz (Casablanca, Mildred Pierce) directed this exciting drama about Army officer Jeb Stuart and the days leading up to the Civil War. Errol Flynn (The Adventures of Robin Hood) stars as Stuart, with Olivia de Havilland as his romantic interest (the seventh of nine times they were paired together by Warner Bros.) The cast includes Ronald Reagan as General George Custer, and Raymond Massey as John Brown, with such familiar faces as Alan Hale and Van Hefflin in supporting roles. Filmed partly in Santa Fe!

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: Ads for this Roy Rogers classic roared HEAD FOR THE MUSICAL HILLS...ROY IS GUNNIN' FOR THRILLS! And thrills are what you'll get when you watch this fun, action packed B-Western from Republic Pictures. There's some great comic relief from Andy Devine and Chester Conklin, two of Hollywood's all-time greats. This old-fashioned shoot-'em-up was directed by William Witney, who would go on to direct many of television's top western sagas, including Bonanza, Wagon Train, and The Wild, Wild West.

programme.title: The Two Gun Man
programme.desc: Ken Maynard stars in this vintage western about ranchers under threat from hired gunmen. Director Phil Rosen, whose career dated back to working with Thomas Edison and included several Charlie Chan features, keeps the action hot with help from a strong ensemble, including Charles King, Murdock MacQuarrie, and a horse named Tarzan! Maynard plays Blackie Weed, a marshall going undercover to capture and arrest some cattle rustlers.He finds himself up against some very bad men, and he's soon framed for murder. Watch as Blackie blazes his way to vindication with a .45 in either hand and the flame of righteous anger in his eyes... Kitty: Nita Martin. Joe Kearney: Lafe McKee. Lem Tolliver: Tom...

programme.title: Diamond Trail
programme.desc: Diamond Trail is an epic that starts in the speeding taxicabs and illegal barrooms of the east coast, and travels west for its exciting climax. Reporter Speed Morgan (Rex Bell), going undercover as Frisco Eddy, infiltrates Flash Barrett's gang in order to bring them all to justice. But can he get the job done before they learn his identity? With a cast that includes Frances Rich and Bud Osborne, this action tale from director Harry L. Fraser (The Last of the Clintons) is another forgotten classic from Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: Fast Bullets
programme.desc: Tom Tyler stars in this vintage western from the short-lived Reliable Pictures Company, a group known for low budgets and lots of action. In this feature, Tom reforms a gang member in order to infiltrate a ring of thieves. Rex Lease, Margaret Nearing, and Al Bridge also star.

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho protect a man being chased by outlaws who believe he is responsible for a gold robbery. Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog. The show was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt, and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1951. This episode aired in 1950.

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho break a woman out of prison before she is hanged for murder.Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog.. The show was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt, and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1951 This episode aired in 1950.

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: A town blames the son-in-law of a the bank president for his murder. Cisco and Pancho work to uncover the truth before the townspeople hang the man. Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog. This episode aired in 1950. The show was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt, and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1951

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: After arriving in the town of Sundance, Cisco witnesses the destruction of a newspaper office. Upon seeing this, Cisco contends with the man trying to take over the town. Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog. This episode aired in 1950. The show was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt, and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1951

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Detectives Matt and Frankie make their way to the town of Coffeyville where they run into the Dalton brothers who are seeking to commit a double bank robbery. Also starring Myron healey, Robert Bray and Robert Foulk. Look for future Daniel Boone/Davy Crocket star Fess Parker as a member of the Dalton gang. Episode originally aired in 1954.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Detective Matt Clark and his partner Frankie head to Tombstone, Arizona to find Doc Holliday with suspicion that Holliday is involved in the gang activity there. Starring Jim Davis, Mary Castle, Kim Spalding, Frank Richards, James Craven amd Harry Harvey. Directed by William Witney. Episode originally aired in 1954. Series won an Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Following their activity with the Quantrill Raiders, the Younger Brothers return on the scene to commit a bank robbery in Minnesota. Detectives Matt and Frankie work to put a stop to their plan. Starring Jim Davis, Mary Castle, George Wallace, Gregory Walcott, Louise Beavers, and Sheb Wooley. Directed by William Witney. Epsiode originally aired in 1954.Series won an Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: The notorious John Wesley Hardin kills two people while on a cattle drive to Abilene. Matt and Frankie head out to bring him to justice. Richard Webb stars as John Wesley Hardin. Also starring Jim Davis, Mary Castle, Howard Negley, Robert Karnes amd John Eldredge. Directed by William Witney. Episode originally aired April 9, 1954.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye is accused of the crimes committed by Ethan Allan and the Green Mountain boys. Hawkeye: John Hart. Chingachcook: Lon Chaney Jr. This syndicated series was filmed in Toronto, and was the final project of prolific Hollywood director Sam Newfeild. Based on characters created by James Fenimore Cooper. Episode originally aired in 1957.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: A town starts to believe they are being cursed by a witch after a series of strange occurences. Hawkeye: John Hart. Chingachcook: Lon Chaney Jr. This syndicated series was filmed in Toronto, and was the final project of prolific Hollywood director Sam Newfeild. Based on characters created by James Fenimore Cooper. Episode originally aired in 1957.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachcook help a Medicine Man who has been driven out of his tribe. Hawkeye: John Hart. Chingachcook: Lon Chaney Jr. This syndicated series was filmed in Toronto, and was the final project of prolific Hollywood director Sam Newfeild. Based on characters created by James Fenimore Cooper. Episode originally aired in 1957.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachcook come across a girl in the woods who is running away from a man named Stark. Hawkeye: John Hart. Chingachcook: Lon Chaney Jr. This syndicated series was filmed in Toronto, and was the final project of prolific Hollywood director Sam Newfeild. Based on characters created by James Fenimore Cooper. Episode originally aired in 1957.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachcook help an old woman find her son who has been missing for 18 years.Hawkeye: John Hart. Chingachcook: Lon Chaney Jr. This syndicated series was filmed in Toronto, and was the final project of prolific Hollywood director Sam Newfeild. Based on characters created by James Fenimore Cooper. Episode originally aired in 1957.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachcook help the long-lost son of a Cree tribal chief.Hawkeye: John Hart. Chingacchook: Lon Chaney Jr. This syndicated series was filmed in Toronto, and was the final project of prolific Hollywood director Sam Newfeild. Based on characters created by James Fenimore Cooper. Episode originally aired in 1957.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachcook go undercover as managers of a trading post. Hawkeye: John Hart. Chingachcook: Lon Chaney Jr. This syndicated series was filmed in Toronto, and was the final project of prolific Hollywood director Sam Newfeild. Based on characters created by James Fenimore Cooper. Episode originally aired in 1957.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: A trader ignites a war between the Hurons and the settlers. Hawkeye: John Hart. Chingachcook: Lon Chaney Jr. This syndicated series was filmed in Toronto, and was the final project of prolific Hollywood director Sam Newfeild. Based on characters created by James Fenimore Cooper. Episode originally aired in 1957.

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: Gene Autry stops singing long enough to take on some nasty land developers in this oldtime western from Republic Pictures. Of course, it wouldnt be a Gene Autry movie if there werent at least a few songs, and this one comes packed with such numbers as Im Beginning to Care, Love, Burning Love, and the title song. Genes longtime sidekick Smiley Burnette gets to sing a few, too, including She Works Third Tub at the Laundry.

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos
programme.desc: Roy Rogers finds himself elected sheriff in a wild Texas town after the Civil War. But can Roy handle a place under martial law? And can he save Gabby Hayes from being executed? And how many songs will he get to sing? Clear the burrs from your saddle and get ready for a good one, also starring Marjorie Reynolds, plus Sally Payne as Belle Starr, Queen of the Oklahoma Outlaws!

programme.title: Yodelin' Kid from Pine Ridge
programme.desc: Cowboy icon Gene Autry is framed for murder in this tale of warring cattlemen and turpentiners. The music driven western from director Joseph Kane (Flame of Barbary Coast) includes such familiar faces as Smiley Burnette, Charles Middleton, and Betty Bronson. In between gunshots you'll hear plenty of traditional cowboy songs, including She'll Be Coming 'Round The Mountain, and Red River Valley, plus Gene's version of Sing Me a Song of the Saddle.

programme.title: Ridin' On
programme.desc: Sometimes it took nothing less than sheer brutality to bring law and order to the untamed West! In this exciting feature from the glory days of quickie westerns, Tom Tyler plays Tom Roarke, a no-nonsense man of his time who can hit hard with either hand. He finds himself in a feud with Danny O'Neil (Rex Lease), who has been accused of cattle rustling and murder. Yet, Roarke suspects O'Neill might be innocent, and that the entire feud has been a frame job. Now he wants to find the real killer!

programme.title: Enemy of the Law
programme.desc: Tex Ritter stars in this western drama about a man who goes undercover to befriend a convict believed to have stolen a shipment of government gold. Also starring Guy Wilkerson as Panhandle Perkins, this offering from Hollywoods Poverty Row features the usual fistfights and entertaining storyline that made these modestly budgeted features well worth watching. Songs include Teach Me To Forget and You Will Have to Pay both sung by Tex!

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Smiley Burnette are back, and this time theyre dealing with some very modern thinking rustlers. These new criminals have taken up the latest technologies to outsmart the authorities, including shortwave radios and airplanes! Can Gene and Smiley get em? You bet! Songs include The West Aint What It Used To Be, I Got the HeebieJeebie Blues, and The Defective Detective from Brooklyn. Gene also gets romantic when he sings, I Picked up the Trail when I Found You...

programme.title: The Lucky Texan
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western. He and George Gabby Hayes strike it rich with a gold mine, only to find their lives complicated by women and crooked officials. Things get even messier when the good guys are framed for murder! Its all action here, particularly since legendary stuntman Yakima Cannut stars as one of the films heavies. Who will win the fight over the gold and the girl? Directed by Robert N. Bradbury for Monogram Pictures. Also starring Barbara Sheldon. (The film was also known as Gold Strike River.)

programme.title: Do I Say I Do
programme.desc: Author Jessica Bender is forced to work with her former boyfriend and editor Mike Pryce. During this association, the two ex begin to realize that the spark of their love is not yet completely extinguished.

programme.title: Deadly Exchange
programme.desc: A British exchange student upends her host family's life when she tries to take the place of their daughter.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie reunite in Ireland after five years, and Jenna must choose between love and her dreams.

programme.title: Pretty Little Stalker
programme.desc: A mother warns her popular son away from a new girlfriend, convinced she is dangerous to both of them.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki goes undercover in a fertility clinic whose unusual success rate is due to the actions of a Swartalfen.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Pete and DeeDee have an announcement for the Gamma brothers. Across campus, Sarah struggles with her new living situation.

programme.title: The Song to My Heart
programme.desc: An organic tea shop owner helps a music sensation write lyrics for a new solo album.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: A patient mistakes his doctor's compassion for adoration and becomes dangerously obsessed.

programme.title: Do I Say I Do
programme.desc: Author Jessica Bender is forced to work with her former boyfriend and editor Mike Pryce. During this association, the two ex begin to realize that the spark of their love is not yet completely extinguished.

programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie reunite in Ireland after five years, and Jenna must choose between love and her dreams.

programme.title: Pretty Little Stalker
programme.desc: A mother warns her popular son away from a new girlfriend, convinced she is dangerous to both of them.

programme.title: Dying for the Crown
programme.desc: A new student at a high school stops at nothing to gain popularity and become homecoming queen at the prom.

programme.title: My Terrorized Teen
programme.desc: When her daughter is tormented by high school mean girls, one mother must stop it before it becomes deadly…

programme.title: Cheer for Your Life
programme.desc: A high schooler faces a brutal cheer initiation. When things turn deadly and she disappears, her mom must act.

programme.title: A Lethal Lesson
programme.desc: High school teacher Lauren is accused of an affair by a student, putting her job and life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Obsession
programme.desc: Sonia has to move from the Big Apple to Boston leaving her friends, family and her ex Tom. She meets Sebastian and one thing leads to another, and a flirtatious smile between them soon turns into a dinner date. However, the more they get to know each other, the more suspicious Sonia becomes. His curiosity about her life soon turns to an obsession. Sonia starts to feel trapped in her relationship. When Tom comes to Seattle, he makes a side trip to visit Sonia and she realizes how much she missed him. After Tom goes back to New York, someone breaks into Sonia’s home. But when she escapes to a friend’s isolated country home for a long weekend she is trapped!! ..Except... Sebastian wasn’t the...

programme.title: Sweetheart Con
programme.desc: Heartbroken over her parents' breakup and recovering from a car accident, Jane becomes increasingly suspicious of her mother's charming new boyfriend.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori hosts a “Bring it Back” themed luncheon for her neighbors in Hidden Hills with the help of Teddi Mellencamp.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Most leave for break, while a few stay behind. Rick is pushed to his breaking point and flips out on Allison.

programme.title: All of My heart 2
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: Dying for the Crown
programme.desc: A new student at a high school stops at nothing to gain popularity and become homecoming queen at the prom.

programme.title: My Terrorized Teen
programme.desc: When her daughter is tormented by high school mean girls, one mother must stop it before it becomes deadly…

programme.desc: High school teacher Lauren is accused of an affair by a student, putting her job and life in jeopardy.
